name: Dungeon Generator
description:
Literally a dungeon generator for heroes like you! Make your personalized dungeon, even with lewd things, just relax and explore the new fortress, garden, island or whatever place you want it to be!

V 1.1 Added a healing mode for physical, mental and physiological damages that removes any source of damage from the dungeons and makes them safe and perfect for healing.

V 1.2 Added description for the monsters

V 1.3 I added new sizes for the dungeons, fixed the descriptions and made the sphere talk telepathically too.
creator: Dracus_Cyberus
